blended.narrative: Devil's Head is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,098 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
